---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for pingtower
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem
What problem are you trying to solve? What's frustrating or missing today?
Ex: "I want to monitor 50+ endpoints but the dashboard becomes hard to scan when…"

## Proposed solution
A clear description of what you'd like pingtower to do. Sketch the UX or API shape if it helps.

## Area
Which part of pingtower does this touch?
- [ ] Monitor checks / scheduling
- [ ] Dashboard / UI
- [ ] JSON API
- [ ] Persistence / storage
- [ ] Notifications / alerting
- [ ] Configuration
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Other:

## Alternatives considered
Other approaches you've thought about & why this one is preferable.

## Use case / impact
Who benefits and how often? Is this a personal need, a common workflow, or a blocker for adopting pingtower?
